caption: The video features an elderly man with white hair tied back, wearing glasses and a blue shirt adorned with eagle patterns. He is also wearing a beaded necklace. The man is seated in front of a microphone, suggesting he is giving a speech or presentation. His expression is serious and focused as he speaks, indicating that he is engaged in delivering important information. The background consists of wooden blinds, which adds to the formal setting of the scene. The logo "ORCA" is visible in the bottom right corner, possibly indicating the organization or event associated with the video. The man's demeanor and the setup suggest a professional or educational context.
